roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: PER DEFENSE COUNSEL, DEFENDANT HAS BEEN INHARBOR LIGHTS FOR THE  PAST 5 MONTHS/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO CHECK-IN WITH ACMAT LEAST 1 TIME WEEKLY/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, TO DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: ASSERTIVE CASE MANAGEMENT ADDENDUM REPORTSTHAT DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT/X: PRETRIAL DIVERSION REPRESENTATIVE,GIO GUARDADO, APPEARS IN COURT TO REPORT THAT DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN ON HOME DETENTION UNTIL COMPLETION OF PROGRAM/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:PHC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER ACOORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:DEFENDANTTO ENTER AND COMPLETE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AT HARBOR LIGHTS AND CHECK IN THE OFFICE 5X A WEEK BY PHONE/  /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/X:DAW IF IN PROGRAM/

/CAL:ACM ELIG REPORT/STWPX/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD:10-07-21 HEARING/CONTD:PHC/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN FILED IN OPEN COURT,/TEXT:CONFLCNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: EAN VIZZI/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSERESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 09-07-21(10)/X: THE 30TH LAST DAY IS 10-05-21, THE 60TH LAST DAYIS 10-22-21/987,2/NB/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT, PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PHC/NP/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL VERIFIED THAT DEFENDANT WAS RELEASED TO A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/CONT/X:DOPU IN PROGRAM/
/CAL:PRELIM HEARING/CONTD: 09-23-21 FOR AN ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/CONTD:10-07-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST 90 MIN/
/CAL:ACM ELIG RPT, MOTION TO DETAIN & PRELIM HEARING/NTW60/LD:10-25-21/CONT/DOP/
